text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, hey, it's you! This is giving fated encounter! We gotta celebrate! Wanna go hard on some tunes together?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to be walking past the station when I get
waylaid by Daitaku Helios and invited to karaoke
out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, the vibes aren't gonna vibe with us just
standing here.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You look like you need a res, and singing's a
surefire way to make that happen!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: This karaoke sesh's gonna be FIRE! Let's goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can make heads or tails of anything,
Daitaku Helios drags me into a karaoke joint.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: All right, bestie, let's do a duet!
choice_data_list: Buckle up and sing with everything you've got.
Clap and cheer to set the mood.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! Let's start off with "Make debut!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Bet! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'll put the music on. You order the party platter,
'kay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, letting loose and livin' it up at karaoke
once in a while's not so bad, is it?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Heck, let's go all-out and stay till it's nearly
curfew!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself having a complete blast partying
hard with Daitaku Helios.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Echo forth! Fanfare! ♪ Sprint on! Towards the
goal, I race!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! ♪ You're slaying it with that cheering!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I knew it was you, Helios! I could recognize
your voice from a mile away.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Was I singing that loudly? That's
hilarious! I'm weak! Anyway, since you're here,
let's sing together!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! Ooh, should I grab some more people,
then?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One invitation leads to another, and more and
more Umamusume pile into the room with
Daitaku Helios at the center of it all.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um... What exactly is going on here?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's some kind of event?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Delightful! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Woo, keep it going! Wahey!
